title: Replace app background with uploaded yellow-red polygonal artwork

requirements.summary: Replace hero background with uploaded yellow-red polygonal artwork while preserving text readability
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded yellow-red polygonal image is saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png, replacing the previous hero background file.
The HeroSection component displays the new polygonal artwork as its full-screen background image.
A dark overlay is applied on top of the background image so that all hero text, tagline, and CTA buttons remain clearly readable.
No other sections or components are affected by this background change.

file_operations.description: Save the uploaded yellow-to-red polygonal low-poly geometric artwork (quality_restoration_20260224213607352.jpg) as the new hero background static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png, replacing any existing file with the same name. This image will serve as the full-screen background for the HeroSection component.

Update the HeroSection component to use the new polygonal artwork background image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) as its full-screen background. Ensure the existing dark overlay remains in place on top of the background image to preserve full readability of all text elements (title, tagline) and CTA buttons. Verify that the background image covers the full viewport height and width appropriately without affecting any other styling or layout of hero content.
